headline: PPG Industries (NYSE:PPG) Proves Its Worth as a Balanced Dividend Play
summary: PPG Industries offers a strong 2.27% dividend yield with a 7/10 ChartMill Dividend Rating, backed by solid profitability and a low 39.94% payout ratio, making it a balanced income play.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Sector Perform on PPG Indus, Raises Price Target to $129
